subcodes.first_line: O ye who are sincere! O ye who are attracted! O ye who are the new creation.... Praise be to the One who created this marvelous dispensation!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المخلصون ایها المنجذبون ایها الخلق الجدید قال الله سبحانه و تعالی
subcodes.subjects: @continual renewal of creation, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
